Docs sidebar

Continuity handoff checklist

Continuity handoff summary

Continuity handoff checklist

Continuity handoff checklists matter when operators need a deterministic sequence for keeping rollback authority valid across shift changes and prolonged incidents.

The checklist spells out review checkpoints, queue health evidence, and the fallback queues that must stay documented before the chain of approval moves.

It also clarifies which fairness controls remain active while the continuity path stays open.
